channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: How I built an AWS Lambda clone with Firecracker microVMs
item.description: Ever wondered what actually happens when you invoke a Lambda function? Not the API layer but the execution layer. What runs your code, how it's isolated, and how AWS gets cold starts low enough to...

item.title: The Parallel Road: A Girl, A Machine, and the Architecture of Mind
item.description: Introduction We have spent years talking about artificial intelligence as if it were an alien entity a cold, sudden artifact dropped into our modern world from some distant technological future....

item.title: React: A Complete Guide from Zero to Production
item.description: Read Time: ~15 minutes | Perfect for developers transitioning to React or deepening their framework knowledge. 📌 What is React? React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with...

item.title: 코딩 에이전트 DESIGN.md란?
item.description: 코딩 에이전트는 빠르게 코드를 작성하지만, 지시하지 않으면 코드베이스의 아키텍처 의도를 모릅니다. Claude Code나 Codex에 모호한 티켓을 주면 컴파일되고 테스트도 통과하지만, 도메인 계층과 HTTP 계층의 경계를 조용히 깨는 코드를 만들 수 있습니다. DESIGN.md는 저장소 안에 아키텍처 의도, 제약 조건, 설계 결정을 기록해...

item.title: Stop Storing Passwords: Build Enterprise SSO in Laravel 🛡️
item.description: Passwords are a Technical Liability When building a B2B SaaS platform at Smart Tech Devs, the default instinct is to scaffold standard email and password authentication. However, in modern...

item.title: Building an Automated KDP Pipeline: How I Engineered a Passive Income Stream with GPT-4 and n8n
item.description: What if your weekend automation project could pay for its own infrastructure and generate passive income? Last quarter, my book-generation pipeline cost $127 in OpenAI API calls and generated...

item.title: Lowdefy Review: Building Internal Tools and AI Agents in YAML
item.description: If you have ever spent two days wiring up a React admin panel so your ops team can edit a database table, you already know the problem Lowdefy is trying to solve. The framework lets you describe a...

item.title: コーディングエージェント向け DESIGN.md とは？
item.description: コーディングエージェントは高速で自信満々ですが、指示しない限りコードベースのアーキテクチャを知りません。Claude...

item.title: The Bank That Blocked Me Twice in One Week
item.description: The Problem We Were Actually Solving We shipped a binary diff tool named diffsweep in 2021. It saved engineering teams 40 percent of their CI minutes by only running tests that touched changed...

item.title: React.js ~use() hook for loading/error guards~
item.description: The Pattern It replaces function UserProfile({ userId }: { userId: string }) { const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); const [error,...

item.title: In SpaceX’s IPO, Elon Musk is a risk factor
item.description: The SpaceX IPO is here, and it's more than just an historic public offering that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. It also reveals more ways in which Elon Musk's companies...

item.title: SpaceX Listed Grok’s ‘Spicy’ Mode as a Risk in Its IPO Filing
item.description: The rocket company has set aside more than $500 million for potential litigation losses, in part to account for complaints alleging that Grok created sexualized images.

item.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
item.description: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

item.title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
item.description: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

item.title: SpaceX Is Spending $2.8 Billion to Buy Gas Turbines for Its AI Data Centers
item.description: The investment comes as Elon Musk’s AI unit faces complaints about the carbon-emitting units and looks to become a big player in cloud computing.

item.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
item.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

item.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
item.description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

item.title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43B of holdings in startups
item.description: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

item.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

item.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

item.title: SpaceX just filed for what could be the biggest IPO ever
item.description: Elon Musk's final frontier is officially open for business now that SpaceX has formally filed its S-1 prospectus with the SEC. That kicks off what could be the largest initial public offering ever...

item.title: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say?
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. This...

item.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
item.description: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

item.title: Here are 42 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
item.description: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — has arrived, bringing with it discounts on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a...

item.title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
item.description: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 29 months earlier, is fixed.

item.title: I’ve tested the latest Switch 2 controllers, and this one is the best
item.description: If you choose to get an extra controller for your Nintendo Switch 2, you can spend a lot — and get a lot in return. Buying Nintendo’s own $89 Switch 2 Pro Controller, for instance, will net you...

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI take their beef to the midterm elections
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the car crashes piling up on a daily basis at the Washington-based intersection of technology and politics. If you're not a...

item.title: Vibe coding is coming to your phone
item.description: "There's an app for that" was the promise of the App Store from the very beginning. The app that will get your phone to do the thing you want it to? It's just a few taps away. The tagline wasn't...

item.title: Volvo is trying to put its EV stumbles in the rearview
item.description: Volvo once had ambitions to fully exit the gas car business. Now it's trying to keep its tenuous foothold in the EV market. It's not an understatement to say that Volvo's EV journey has been a...

item.title: Microsoft Open-Sources RAMPART and Clarity to Secure AI Agents During Development
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled two new open-source tools called RAMPART and Clarity to assist developers in better testing the security of artificial intelligence (AI) agents. RAMPART, short for Risk...
